summary: Iteration 24 - Event Workflow End-to-End Testing Complete. All 22 tests passed (100%). Verified full event lifecycle: Prospect → Booking → Calendar → 3-Course Menu BEO → Room Layout → AI Recipe Generation → Labor Schedules (4 depts with separate GL codes) → Purchase Orders → Mock Invoices → Financial Posting to EchoAurum with USALI GL codes. LUCCCA Launch Party (390 guests) data verified. Steward count calculation confirmed: ceil(390/75) = 6 stewards.

minor.issue: NoneType error when BEO doesn't exist - FIXED by adding null check for beo.get('layout_name')

critical_code_review_comments: All 16 event workflow endpoints tested and working correctly
Steward count calculation verified: ceil(390/75) = 6 stewards for LUCCCA Launch Party
4 labor schedules with separate GL codes: Kitchen (6100), Setup (6110), Dining (6120), Stewarding (6130)
Labor rates verified: Cook $22.50/hr, Setup $18/hr, Dining $20/hr, Steward $17/hr
USALI GL codes verified: Revenue (4100-4130), COGS (5100-5110), Labor (6100-6130), OpEx (7100-7110)
3 POs generated grouped by vendor: Sysco Foods, US Foods, Chef's Warehouse
3 mock invoices created with 7% tax rate and GL code 5100 (COGS)
Full P&L calculation working: Revenue $59,900, COGS $17,622, Labor $7,716, Net margin 54.1%
Changelog tracks 16 cross-module actions from event creation to financial posting
BEO includes 3 courses with AI-generated recipes (Seared Tuna Tataki, Filet Mignon Wellington, Chocolate Lava Fondant)
Floor plan layout attached with 43 tables, 354 seats across 6 sections + VIP
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed events during testing for new event creation flow verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 verified complete event workflow. Existing LUCCCA Launch Party event (ID: e0609bb9-8d50-45cd-bc0f-8af25cdd50f0) has full data: BEO with 3 courses, 43-table layout, 4 labor schedules, 3 POs, 3 invoices, 11 GL entries. Key endpoints: POST /api/event-workflow/prospect-to-booking, attach-menu, attach-layout, generate-missing-recipes, generate-schedules, generate-purchase-orders, generate-invoices, post-financials. GET endpoints: /event/{id}, /beo/{id}, /changelog/{id}, /gl-entries/{id}, /schedules/{id}, /purchase-orders/{id}, /invoices/{id}. Fixed minor bug in generate-schedules where beo could be None.
